data.title: India Braces for More Fuel Hikes As Iran War Forces Modi’s Hand
data.description: India’s consumers — hit with the first fuel price hike in four years — will likely face more such rises in the near term, as the government grapples with the economic impact of a months-long conflict in the Persian Gulf.
data.keywords: India,Iran,War,Government,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Generic 1st 'XB' Future,Persian Gulf,Indian Rupee Spot,Media,ICRA LTD,economics,markets
